title: Employee Referral Program and Bonus Policy
text:
Q: How does the Employee Referral Program work and what is the bonus policy?
A: Our Employee Referral Program encourages employees to refer qualified candidates for open positions within the company. If your referral is hired and successfully completes 90 days of employment, you will receive a bonus of $1,000. To participate, please submit your referral through the designated online portal or contact the HR department directly. Ensure that your referral is aware of the application process and mentions your name during their application. Bonuses are processed in the payroll cycle following the completion of the 90-day period. For any questions or further details, please reach out to the HR team at hr@company.com.
